title: CFunction
subtitle: A wrapper around a C function exposed to Io as an activatable slot.

members.description:
Returns self if the argument is a CFunction with the same internal C
    function pointer.

members.name: id
members.description:
Returns a number containing a unique id for the receiver's internal C
    function.

members.name: name
members.description: Returns the CFunction name in the form CFunction_Pointer.

members.name: performOn
members.description: optionalContext) Activates the CFunctions with the supplied settings.

members.name: profilerTime
members.description: Returns clock() time spent in compiler in seconds.

members.name: setProfilerOn
members.description:
If aBool is true, the global block profiler is enabled, if false it is
    disabled. Returns self.

members.name: typeName
members.description:
Returns the owning type of the CFunction or nil if the CFunction can be
    called on any object.

members.name: uniqueName
members.description: Returns the name given to the CFunction.
